name: English
note: Requires a minimum cumulative 2.0 GPA in all courses counted toward the major.

items.title: Introduction to Literary Studies: The Art of Reading and Writing (WE)

sections.label: Three English Courses (305+)
sections.description: Three English courses numbered 305 or above, one of which must be in British literature before 1800.

sections.label: Two Additional English Courses
sections.description: Two additional English course credits, one of which may be in Creative Writing or in French, German, or Spanish literature in translation (FRE-145, FRE-146, FRE-148, GER-148, or SPA-148).

options.title: Seminar in Literature: United States Pluralism (WE)
